failedAssertions.reason: Concert card images use picsum.photos random seeded images (ocean waves, camera equipment, mountain landscapes) instead of actual concert/artist imagery. The seed data (prisma/seed.ts) has artistImageUrl pointing to picsum.photos/seed/taylorswift, picsum.photos/seed/edsheeran, etc. which return random images. Additionally, the ConcertCard component has a fallback to picsum.photos/seed/concert for empty artistImageUrl. While the concert cards have themed design elements (music note icons, gradient overlays, artist names), the underlying images are random landscapes/objects, not concert/music-themed.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented that all main pages require authentication (redirect to /login) - no public page access
